title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Country Delight Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight Ventures Solutions:
Country Delight Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
